The '''wind-runner''' was a vehicle used by the [[Chubbit]]s for traveling on their [[Desert/Legends|desert]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Aridus/Legends|Aridus]]. It resembled a [[Wood/Legends|wooden]] ship with four large wheels and two massive sails which it probably used to trap the wind.

In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], and an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Actor/Legends|actor]] disguised as the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] used it to travel to [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader's]] [[Iron Tower]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]].

==Appearances==
*"[[The Return of Ben Kenobi]]" {{Reprint|The Return of Ben Kenobi}} {{1st}}
